dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Monitor trust score, active bonds, and recent protocol activity from one place.
dashboard.connectFreighter: Connect Freighter to load your trust score, active bonds, and recent activity.
dashboard.createBondDescription: Lock more USDC into reputation bonds.
dashboard.viewTrustScoreDescription: Look up score details and tier context.
dashboard.mockDataBanner: Dashboard figures are mock protocol data until live account indexing is connected.

appearance.heading: Appearance
appearance.description: Controls for theme and visual preferences.
appearance.quickToggleHint: Use the quick toggle to flip light/dark immediately. Theme radio buttons above apply on Save.

network.heading: Network
network.description: Choose the Stellar network to interact with.

display.heading: Display
display.description: How addresses and identifiers are presented in the UI.

backup.heading: Backup & Restore
backup.description: Export your settings as a JSON file, or import settings from a previous export.

importDialog.title: Import Settings
importDialog.subtitle: Review the changes below before applying.
importDialog.noChanges: Imported settings match your current settings. No changes will be made.
importDialog.changesIntro: The following settings from {{file}} will be applied:
importDialog.confirmHint: This will overwrite your current settings with the imported values.

toasts.reverted: Settings reverted to last saved state

bond.title: Bond USDC
bond.description: Lock USDC into the Credence contract to build your economic reputation.
bond.infoBanner: Bonds are locked for a minimum of 30 days. Early withdrawal incurs a slash penalty.
bond.connectRequiredDescription: Create bond and withdraw actions require a connected Stellar wallet.
bond.networkMismatchDescription: Credence is set to {{expected}}, but Freighter is on {{actual}}. Switch the app to the wallet network before creating or withdrawing a bond.
bond.slashExposureDescription: Withdrawing {{amount}} while {{status}} may slash up to {{penaltyAmount}} ({{percent}}% penalty). You would receive approximately {{result}}.
bond.createBondDescription: Lock USDC using the guided four-step wizard — set an amount, choose a lock duration, review slash terms, and confirm.
bond.noActiveBondsDescription: You do not have any active bonds yet. Create your first bond to start building on-chain reputation.
bond.disclaimerContext: Bonding USDC locks funds in a non-custodial smart contract. Slashing conditions apply.

trustScore.title: Trust Score
trustScore.description: Your reputation score is computed from bond amount, duration, and attestations.
trustScore.infoBanner: Scores update once per epoch. Recent bond changes may not be reflected immediately.
trustScore.connectRequiredDescription: Connect a wallet to look up your own trust score. You can still type another Stellar address for review.
trustScore.networkMismatchDescription: Credence is set to {{expected}}, but Freighter is on {{actual}}. Switch the app to the wallet network before looking up a trust score.
trustScore.disclaimerContext: Trust scores are protocol metrics only and do not constitute creditworthiness assessments.

attestations.title: Attestations
attestations.description: Submit cryptographic evidence and vouches to build your economic trust score.

transactions.title: Transaction History
transactions.description: A durable record of your bond, withdrawal, and attestation events.
transactions.noTransactionsDescription: Your bond, withdrawal, and attestation events will appear here once you start transacting.
transactions.noResults: No {{filter}} transactions. Try a different filter.

confirmDialog.defaultConfirmHint: This action cannot be undone. Funds will be sent to your connected wallet.
confirmDialog.confirmHint: This will overwrite your current settings with the imported values.
